title: TrackerOfKills
description: Live zombie kill statistics on a movable HUD overlay for tracking.
body:
# TrackerOfKills - Zombie Kill Tracker HUD

**TrackerOfKills** is a lightweight mod that tracks zombie kills with a movable HUD overlay, displaying real-time kill rates.


## 🌟 Core Features
### 📊 **Real-Time Kill Statistics Display**
- **Total Kill Counter**: Shows your all-time zombie kill count from Minecraft's built-in statistics system
- **Session Tracking**: Displays kills accumulated since joining the current world/server session (shown in parentheses)
- **KPM (Kills Per Minute)**: Calculates your zombie kill rate over the last 60 seconds
- **KPH (Kills Per Hour)**: Calculates your zombie kill rate over the past 60 minutes
- **Visual Feedback**: The overlay highlights with a yellow border when being dragged
- **Toggle Overlay Position Mode**: **C** key opens the positioning interface
- **Reset Position**: **J** key instantly resets overlay to default location
- **Persistent Configuration**: All settings are automatically saved to `config/trackerofkills.json`
- **Cross-Session Memory**: Remembers your preferred overlay position between gaming sessions
- **Sliding Window Analysis**: Kill rates are calculated using a rolling time window for accuracy
- **Specialized Targeting**: Specifically tracks zombie kills
- **Statistics Integration**: Leverages Minecraft's native statistics system for accuracy
- **Responsive Interface**: Smooth dragging mechanics with real-time visual feedback

If the server you play on is using MythicMobs plugin this mod will most likely work for your use case only if the MythicMobs are actually a zombie.

I got the inspiration to make this mod from a server I play on called DungeonCraft.

If you want to check it out the ip is DungeonCraft.co.
